arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. FC Twente injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Europa League clash between Manchester United and FC Twente.

arts.ttl: Ten Hag wishes Man Utd didn’t have to face FC Twente
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag told his press conference on Tuesday that he would have preferred not to face FC Twente in the Europa League. On Wednesday, FC Twente take on Manchester United at Old Trafford in the Europa League. It is widely known that Erik ten Hag is a fan of the Tukkers. arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Drops Man Utd Update on Amad Diallo
arts.sum: Manchester United are in the early stages of contract talks with Amad Diallo, but nothing is imminent.

arts.ttl: Manchester United fan sentenced after sick chant during recent Liverpool clash
arts.sum: He is one of two Man United supporters to appear in court in the past few days for mocking diasters

arts.ttl: First Images of Manchester United's Proposed New 2bn Stadium
arts.sum: The project will attract an additional 1.8 million visitors each year to help put Manchester United back on the map.

arts.ttl: Man Utd could sign next Bellingham in January
arts.sum: Manchester United may reportedly push to sign Sunderland midfielder Chris Rigg during the January transfer window in order to fight off competition from Newcastle United. However, Man Utd are desperate to win the race for Rigg’s signature and they are ready to launch a January pursuit in order to complete a deal for the 17-year-old.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho has left clear Man United blueprint for three newest first team players
arts.sum: Similarly to three new Manchester United teammates, Alejandro Garnacho took his first steps with the Premier League giants in the EFL Trophy.

arts.ttl: 5 things spotted from Man Utd training as Marcus Rashford responds before FC Twente test
arts.sum: Manchester United begin their Europa League campaign against FC Twente on Wednesday - and their training session offered plenty of hints towards their state of mind
